diff:
diff --git a/src/blanklines.py b/src/blanklines.py
index b420bea..d75ed11 100644
--- a/src/blanklines.py
+++ b/src/blanklines.py
@@ -1,11 +1,14 @@
 def collapse_blank_lines(text):
-    lines = text.splitlines()
+    lines = text.splitlines(True)
     collapsed = []
     previous_blank = False
     for line in lines:
-        blank = line == ""
+        blank = line.strip() == ""
         if blank and previous_blank:
             continue
-        collapsed.append(line)
+        collapsed.append(line.rstrip('\n'))
         previous_blank = blank
-    return "\n".join(collapsed)
+    result = "\n".join(collapsed)
+    if text.endswith("\n"):
+        result += "\n"
+    return result
